title: Release + batch review: MEMORY.md SHIPPED entry + release-notes + Gemini batch review + cite-coverage report
scope: MEMORY.md + release notes + Gemini review session + cite-coverage artifact
description: End-of-rc closeout per feedback_review_batching memo. Run ONE Gemini batch review over the rc.23 cumulative diff (T1..T10), generate a cite-coverage snapshot for the rc.23 window, draft release notes covering all 9 scopes (F1-F6 + a-B + a-C1/C2 + c + d + e), and append a SHIPPED entry to ~/.claude/projects/-Users-wepie-Desktop-personal-projects-pcf/memory/MEMORY.md + project_rc23_shipped.md.

files.change: Capture: 9 scopes shipped, test counts, Gemini verdict, ship date 2026-05-18
Add new rc.23 section grouping the 9 scopes with one-line summaries each

implementation: Run full test suite: `pnpm -r test` and capture counts (target: rc.22 baselines or better)

Launch Gemini batch review: `maestro delegate "PURPOSE: cross-scope review of rc.23 diff; TASK: spot integration issues between F1-F6 schema sweep, a-B reconcile changes, a-C field additions, c sentinel parsing, d non-blocking startup, e doctor lock check ..." --to gemini --mode analysis --rule analysis-review-code-quality`
Wait for verdict; if PASS proceed; if FAIL → cycle blockers as individual fix tasks
Draft CHANGELOG.md release notes for rc.23
Write project_rc23_shipped.md memory file with the standard SHIPPED template
Final smoke: `fab -v` shows v2.0.0-rc.23 (assumes release-rc skill ran the version bump separately)

reference.pattern: rc.22 SHIPPED entry in MEMORY.md + project_rc22_shipped.md
reference.examples: Mirror rc.22 SHIPPED tone + structure exactly

criteria: Gemini batch review verdict captured (PASS / blockers)
CHANGELOG.md rc.23 section present with 9 scopes
MEMORY.md index has the new pointer line

rationale.chosen_approach: One batch review at end (feedback_review_batching) — catches cross-scope interaction issues per-task review misses
decision_factors: Cross-scope interaction risk: F1+c overlap, a-B+d overlap
rationale.tradeoffs: Single Gemini-API failure point — mitigated by Qwen fallback

manual_checks: Spot-check release notes for accuracy against actual commits
success_metrics: Gemini verdict: SHIP IT (or PASS with no blockers)
